---
title: "R Bootcamp Summer 2025"
source: "Workshop Material"
author: "Jeff Girard"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: [Statistical Foundation, Programming Skills, Data Wrangling]
tech-lang: [R]
main-format: [Slides, Recording, Code]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This Social Science Summer Statistics Bootcamp is intended to prepare incoming graduate students for their coursework by providing a refresher in R, research design, and statistics.

## Module Materials

```{=html}
<iframe id="kmsembed-1_y8g29f74" width="600" height="374" src="https://mediahub.ku.edu/embed/secure/iframe/entryId/1_y8g29f74/uiConfId/54254972/st/0" class="kmsembed" allowfullscreen webkitallowfullscreen mozAllowFullScreen allow="autoplay *; fullscreen *; encrypted-media *" referrerPolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade" sandbox="allow-downloads allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-top-navigation allow-pointer-lock allow-popups allow-modals allow-orientation-lock allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-presentation allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" title="KDSC Bootcamp R "></iframe>
```

```{=html}
<br>

<a href="KDSC_S4_Bootcamp_Girard_R.html" download="KDSC_S4_Bootcamp_Girard_R.html" 
   style="display:inline-block; padding:10px 20px; background-color:#397cfb; color:white; text-decoration:none; border-radius:5px;">
  Download the material
</a>
```

This Material is under the [CC BY-ND license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nd/2.0/deed.en)
